title: diphyes oligochaete
side_effects: Diphyes oligochaete can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Ingestion of large quantities can lead to gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach cramps. Additionally, improper application or handling can cause skin irritation, including redness and itching, particularly in individuals with sensitive skin. Prolonged exposure to Diphyes oligochaete extracts can also disrupt normal hormonal balances, potentially affecting reproductive health and thyroid function.
